title: Glowing Eyes
description: Glowing Eyes is a Minecraft Mod to make your eyes glow, inspired by the Vampirism mod!
body:
# Glowing Eyes  

**Glowing Eyes** is a Minecraft mod that lets you customize and make your character’s eyes glow! Inspired by the [Vampirism](https://github.com/TeamLapen/Vampirism) mod, this mod adds a detailed eye editor with color selection, presets, and new customization options. Stand out in the dark with glowing eyes!

![Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RaydanOMGr/GlowingEyes/refs/heads/screenshots/glowingeyes_preview.webp)

With [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) support!

![Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RaydanOMGr/GlowingEyes/refs/heads/screenshots/glowingeyes_preview_freshmoves.webp)

## FAQ

### Does this mod work in multiplayer?
Yes, however, the mod must be installed on both the server and the client for it to work properly. Players that do not have the mod can still play, but will not see the glowing eyes.

### Why doesn’t the mod work / why don’t my eyes glow?
Most likely, you accidentally turned off your eyes. The default keybinding to toggle glowing eyes on and off is `G`. If that doesn’t fix the issue, please report a bug on the [GitHub issues tab](https://github.com/RaydanOMGr/GlowingEyes) or in the [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/3vfnvBFRKv).

## Usage

### General Usage

To access the eye editor, use the `/eyes` command or press the keybinding (`H` by default). This will open the customization menu, where you can tweak your glowing eyes.

![Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RaydanOMGr/GlowingEyes/refs/heads/screenshots/glowingeyes_editor.webp)

- **Left side:** Drawing, erasing and color picking tools to design your glowing eyes.
- **Right side:** Preset manager, color picker, and two additional buttons:
  - **Skin part selector:** Choose which part of the skin you want to apply glowing eyes to.
  - **Reset button:** Completely removes your current eyes, including other skin parts (but not presets).

### Skin Parts

With the skin parts system, you are no longer limited to adding eyes only to the front of your character’s head. Now, you can apply glowing eyes anywhere on your head and head overlay!

![Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RaydanOMGr/GlowingEyes/refs/heads/screenshots/glowingeyes_skinpartselector.webp)

This feature allows for more creative and unique glowing eye designs, such as side or back-facing eyes!

### Presets

Presets allow you to save and quickly switch between different glowing eye designs.

![Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RaydanOMGr/GlowingEyes/refs/heads/screenshots/glowingeyes_presets.webp)

- The **preset menu** lets you create, save, and apply different presets.
- All presets are saved in the `presets.json` file in your Minecraft directory.
- Easily experiment with different glowing eye styles without losing your designs!

## Need Support?

If you need help, have a question, or just want to chat, join the [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/3vfnvBFRKv).
To report bugs or suggest features, please use the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/RaydanOMGr/GlowingEyes).

## Thanks!

Big thanks to [Olivo](https://github.com/Olivoz) for helping with the editor GUI screen! If not him, this all would not be possible!
Thanks to the [Vampirism](https://github.com/TeamLapen/Vampirism) mod and its authors/contributors for the idea, inspiration, and some code, **please check them out!**
Huge thanks to the [Modded Minecraft Discord Server](https://discord.gg/moddedmc) for their help with coding!
